name: Fruit Cocktail Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water; let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Add boiling water and stir until the gelatin is dissolved.
3. Add lemon juice and saccharin.
4. Chill until the mixture begins to set.
5. Beat with a rotary beater until fluffy.
6. Fold in the fruit cocktail.
7. Chill until firm.
NOTE: Other dietetic-packed fruits may be substituted for fruit cocktail. The liquid drained from the fruit may be brought to a boil and used instead of boiling water. For jellied Fruit Salad, omit beating if preferred.
